testcases.input: word1 = "abc", word2 = "pqr" Output: "apbqcr" Explanation: The merged string will be merged as so: word1: a b c word2: p q r merged: a p b q c r
testcases.expectedOutput: "apbqcr" Explanation: The merged string will be merged as so: word1: a b c word2: p q r merged: a p b q c r

testcases.input: word1 = "ab", word2 = "pqrs" Output: "apbqrs" Explanation: Notice that as word2 is longer, "rs" is appended to the end. word1: a b word2: p q r s merged: a p b q r s
testcases.expectedOutput: "apbqrs" Explanation: Notice that as word2 is longer, "rs" is appended to the end. word1: a b word2: p q r s merged: a p b q r s

testcases.input: word1 = "abcd", word2 = "pq" Output: "apbqcd" Explanation: Notice that as word1 is longer, "cd" is appended to the end. word1: a b c d word2: p q merged: a p b q c d
testcases.expectedOutput: "apbqcd" Explanation: Notice that as word1 is longer, "cd" is appended to the end. word1: a b c d word2: p q merged: a p b q c d
